IRE wins grant to start operation

NICAR Staff December 1995
Data & DatabasesInvestigative MethodsJournalism & Newsroom

Investigative Reporters and Editors (IRE) received a $544,000 three-year grant to support investigative journalism efforts across the Americas.

Investigative Reporters and Editors (IRE) recently won a $544,000 three-year grant... in the Americas.
